headline: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Duke Energy/
summary: To strengthen communities across South Carolina as the nation approaches its 250th anniversary, Duke Energy Foundation is awarding $275,000 to nonprofit organizations through a first round of funding as part of its America250 initiative.

raw.headline: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Duke Energy/
raw.summary: To strengthen communities across South Carolina as the nation approaches its 250th anniversary, Duke Energy Foundation is awarding $275,000 to nonprofit organizations through a first round of funding as part of its America250 initiative.

headline: Duke Energy Foundation announces first round of America250 grants to strengthen and protect South Carolina green spaces

headline: Steve Jobs called Tim Cook ‘not a product person,’ but still handpicked him to run Apple and turn it into a $4 trillion tech giant
summary: Tim Cook steps down having grown Apple’s market cap from about $350 billion to $4 trillion.
